commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes ACP final_only projection to retain accumulated final text and output-limit counters across intermediate done/error events and adds projector regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main flushes and resets the ACP projector on every runtime done/error, while dispatch-acp performs a later turn-level flush and docs describe final_only as turn-scoped buffering. I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can preserve boundary separator state and add the missing projector regression without broader product judgment.

target.title: fix(acp): preserve final_only text across tool-call boundaries
target.body:
## Summary

Addresses the ACP `final_only` delivery-mode portion of #84486 — text produced before tool calls was lost because `resetTurnState()` cleared `finalOnlyOutputText` between model invocations within the same ACP turn.

Three changes in `final_only` mode:
- `finalOnlyOutputText` survives `resetTurnState()` across invocations
- `emittedOutputChars` and `truncationNoticeEmitted` also survive so `acp.stream.maxOutputChars` is enforced per accumulated turn
- Intermediate `done` events skip final text delivery — accumulated text is delivered once at turn completion via `flush(true)`

## Changes

- `src/auto-reply/reply/acp-projector.ts`: `finalOnlyOutputText`, `emittedOutputChars`, and `truncationNoticeEmitted` no longer cleared in `resetTurnState()` for `final_only` mode; `flush()` accepts `skipFinalText` option; `onEvent` passes `skipFinalText: true` for `done`/`error` events in `final_only` mode
- `src/auto-reply/reply/acp-projector.test.ts`: updated existing `final_only` buffering test; added regression test for multi-invocation text accumulation; added regression test for multi-invocation `maxOutputChars` truncation

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Pre-tool text in final_only delivery mode is discarded when resetTurnState() clears finalOnlyOutputText between model invocations. Output limit counters (emittedOutputChars) were also reset, allowing text to exceed acp.stream.maxOutputChars across invocations.

Real environment tested: macOS Darwin 25.4.0 (arm64), Node.js v24.14.1, OpenClaw 2026.5.19 (2cb5d72)

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```
pnpm test src/auto-reply/reply/acp-projector.test.ts \
  src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts \
  src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp-delivery.test.ts

pnpm format:check src/auto-reply/reply/acp-projector.ts

pnpm lint src/auto-reply/reply/acp-projector.ts

node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/proof-84501-runtime.test.ts --reporter=verbose
```

Evidence after fix:
```
 Test Files  3 passed (3)
      Tests  99 passed (99)

 Format: all matched files use the correct format
 Lint:   0 warnings and 0 errors

 === Real ACP projector runtime proof (deliveryMode=final_only) ===

 [Invocation 1] Model outputs text before tool call:
   -> finalOnlyOutputText now contains 2 sentences of planning text
   -> done(toolUse): skipFinalText=true, text NOT delivered yet
   deliveries after invocation 1:
     kind=tool  text="Tool Call: Run SQL query, status=in_progress"

 [Invocation 2] Model outputs text after tool result:
   -> more text accumulated on top of invocation 1 text
   -> done(stop): text still deferred

 [Turn Completion] projector.flush(true) called:
   deliveries after flush:
     kind=tool  text="Tool Call: Run SQL query, status=in_progress"
     kind=final  text="Step 1: Analyzing the data schema. Step 2: Planning the SQL query.Step 3: Query …"

 VERIFICATION:
   Final deliveries: 1 (expected: 1)
   Final text length: 137 chars
   Contains "Step 1": true, "Step 2": true, "Step 3": true, "Step 4": true

   [PASS] FIX CONFIRMED: All 4 steps delivered in one final message.
          Pre-tool text (Steps 1-2) survived across the tool-call
          boundary and was delivered together with post-tool text (Steps 3-4).
```

Observed result after fix: 99 regression/unit tests pass. Real ACP projector runtime proof (createAcpReplyProjector invoked directly, not mocked) demonstrates that in final_only mode, pre-tool text ("Step 1: Analyzing the data schema. Step 2: Planning the SQL query.") survives across the done(toolUse) → resetTurnState() boundary. On turn completion via flush(true), all 4 steps are delivered in one final message. New tests cover multi-invocation text accumulation and maxOutputChars truncation enforcement.

What was not tested: Live Feishu/Telegram channel delivery with real ACP session (requires live credentials and channel setup); the Feishu-specific streaming-card delivery path (separate from ACP dispatch)
